ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student (e.g., male, female) */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Date of graduation */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Current GPA of the student */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the student */,
  "disability_status" TEXT /* Indicates if the student has a disability (e.g., yes, no) */,
  "financial_aid_status" TEXT /* Indicates if the student is receiving financial aid (e.g., yes, no) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "assessment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assessment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the assessment */,
  "date_administered" TEXT /* Date the assessment was administered */,
  "max_score" REAL /* Maximum possible score for the assessment */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment type (foreign key to assessment_types) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the assessment in minutes */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the assessment (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES assessment_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_assessments" (
  "student_assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student-assessment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment */,
  "score" REAL /* Actual score obtained by the student */,
  "score_hat" REAL /* Predicted score based on a statistical model */,
  "residual" REAL /* Difference between the actual score and the predicted score */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course (foreign key to courses) */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor (foreign key to instructors) */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided to the student on the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_assessments_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_assessments_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_assessments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_assessments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Course code */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is offered */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the course is offered */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours for the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisite courses required for enrollment */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, withdrawn) */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Final grade received by the student in the course */,
  "attendance_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of class sessions attended by the student */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor (foreign key to instructors) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the instructor */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the instructor */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_instructors" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the assignment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the assignment */,
  "teaching_rating" REAL /* Average teaching rating given by students */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructors_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructors_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the assessment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the assessment type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment result */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "score" REAL /* Actual score obtained by the student */,
  "score_hat" REAL /* Predicted score based on a statistical model */,
  "residual" REAL /* Difference between the actual score and the predicted score */,
  "date_submitted" TEXT /* Date the result was submitted */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor (foreign key to instructors) */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided to the student on the assessment result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_results_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_results_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_results_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_results_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)
